# Roadmap

## Near Term

- Expand examples for aggregations, CTEs, and window functions
- Add beginner-to-advanced exercise packs by domain
- Improve cross-links between theory and practice

## Mid Term

- Add engine-specific guides for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, SQLite
- Add query performance tuning section
- Add data modeling case studies

## Long Term

- Build an interactive exercise interface
- Add automated SQL validation workflows
- Add curated exam-style mock sets with answer explanations

## Tracking

Use issues and milestones to map roadmap items to deliverables.
